onChange.script:
rows = BlueRidge.Common.Util.extractQualifiedValues(self.view.custom.shiftTally) or []
	ids = [r.get("ToolCavityId") for r in rows]
	cur = self.view.custom.tallyCavityId
	if cur is None or cur not in ids:
		self.view.custom.tallyCavityId = BlueRidge.Lots.Lot.defaultShiftCavityId(rows)

tooltip.text: Re-fetch the mounted tool + shift tally

transforms.code:
cells = BlueRidge.Common.Util.extractQualifiedValues(value) or []
	return [{"label": c.get("label"), "value": c.get("value")} for c in cells]

config.expression: if(isNull({view.custom.activeTool.ToolCode}) || {view.custom.activeTool.ToolCode} = "", "No die mounted", "Tool " + {view.custom.activeTool.ToolCode} + " mounted  ·  " + toStr(len({view.custom.cavityOptions})) + " cavities active")

props.text: Pre-printed labels per FRS 2.2.1. Server mints the LOT id (D4 default).
Eligible items for the active cell.
No die-cast operation template on the route for this part - it cannot be run.

config.script:
# Launch the Config app's Tools page (separate project; logs in on its own).
	system.perspective.navigate(url="/data/perspective/client/MPP_Config/parts/tools", newTab=True)

props.text: Active cavities on the mounted tool. No active cavities? Type one (manual, D2).

customMethods.name: submitCreate
customMethods.script:
draft = BlueRidge.Common.Util.extractQualifiedValues(self.view.custom.editDraft) or {}
	tool = BlueRidge.Common.Util.extractQualifiedValues(self.view.custom.activeTool) or {}
	cell = BlueRidge.Common.Util.extractQualifiedValues(self.session.custom.cell) or {}
	# Cavity: an option pick carries a real ToolCavityId; ANY typed (custom) value - numeric or not -
	# is a manual cavity note (D2). Classify by membership in the dropdown options, NOT by int() parse:
	# a typed cavity NUMBER arrives as a string and must never be mistaken for a ToolCavityId.
	cav = draft.get("toolCavityId")
	toolCavityId = None
	cavityNote = None
	if cav is not None and cav != "":
		opts = BlueRidge.Common.Util.extractQualifiedValues(self.view.custom.cavityOptions) or []
		optIds = [o.get("value") for o in opts if o]
		try:
			cavId = int(cav)
		except (ValueError, TypeError):
			cavId = None
		if cavId is not None and cavId in optIds:
			toolCavityId = cavId
		else:
			cavityNote = unicode(cav)
	# Gate (2026-07-06 Jacques): a part with no die-cast operation template on its route cannot run.
	tplId = BlueRidge.Parts.OperationTemplate.getActiveTemplateIdForRoute(draft.get("itemId"), "DieCast")
	if tplId is None:
		BlueRidge.Common.Notify.toast("No operation template", "The route for this part has no die-cast operation template - it cannot run at Die Cast.", "error")
		return None
	data = {
		"itemId": draft.get("itemId"),
		"lotOriginTypeId": self.view.custom.manufacturedOriginId,
		"currentLocationId": cell.get("locationId"),
		"pieceCount": BlueRidge.Common.Util.toIntOrNone(draft.get("pieceCount")),
		"weight": BlueRidge.Common.Util.toDecimalOrNone(draft.get("weight")),
		"weightUomId": draft.get("weightUomId"),
		"toolId": tool.get("ToolId"),
		"toolCavityId": toolCavityId,
	}
	appUserId = self.session.custom.appUserId
	termId = None
	try:
		termId = self.session.custom.terminal.terminalLocationId
	except:
		termId = None
	result = BlueRidge.Lots.Lot.create(data, appUserId, termId, None, cavityNote)
	BlueRidge.Common.Ui.notifyResult(result, successTitle="LOT created")
	if result and result.get("Status"):
		self.view.custom.activeLotId = result.get("NewId")
		minted = result.get("MintedLotName")
		scanned = draft.get("scannedLtt")
		if scanned and minted and scanned != minted:
			BlueRidge.Common.Notify.toast("LTT mismatch", "Scanned %s but minted %s" % (scanned, minted), "warning")
		peers = BlueRidge.Common.Util.extractQualifiedValues(self.view.custom.peersThisSession) or []
		peers.append({"peer": {"Cavity": (toolCavityId if toolCavityId is not None else cavityNote), "LotName": minted, "PieceCount": data.get("pieceCount"), "LotId": result.get("NewId")}})
		self.view.custom.peersThisSession = peers
		self.view.custom.selectedLotId = result.get("NewId")
		self.view.custom.activeLotName = minted
		self.view.custom.refreshToken = (self.view.custom.refreshToken or 0) + 1
	return result

customMethods.name: applyCell
cancelDraft
customMethods.script:
# Reset the whole NEW LOT form (per-leaf writes for reliable bidi refresh).
	self.view.custom.editDraft.scannedLtt = ""
	self.view.custom.editDraft.itemId = None
	self.view.custom.editDraft.toolCavityId = None
	self.view.custom.editDraft.cavityNote = None
	self.view.custom.editDraft.pieceCount = None
	self.view.custom.editDraft.weight = None
	self.view.custom.editDraft.weightUomId = None

customMethods.name: applyItemDefaults
customMethods.script:
# 2026-07-07 Jacques: prefill Piece Count from the part's PARTS-PER-BASKET, which is
	# Item.MaxLotSize (repurposed as PartsPerBasket, Data Model v1.9; the Config Tool Item
	# screen labels it Parts Per Basket). DefaultSubLotQty kept only as a dev-data fallback.
	# Weight (UnitWeight x count, when configured) when the operator picks a part.
	# Only fills EMPTY fields - never overwrites operator-entered values.
	itemId = BlueRidge.Common.Util.extractQualifiedValues(itemId)
	row = BlueRidge.Parts.Item.getOne(itemId)
	if not row:
		return
	d = BlueRidge.Common.Util.extractQualifiedValues(self.view.custom.editDraft) or {}
	perBasket = row.get("MaxLotSize") or row.get("DefaultSubLotQty")
	unitWeight = row.get("UnitWeight")
	if perBasket and d.get("pieceCount") in (None, ""):
		self.view.custom.editDraft.pieceCount = perBasket
	if perBasket and unitWeight and d.get("weight") in (None, ""):
		self.view.custom.editDraft.weight = round(float(unitWeight) * float(perBasket), 3)
	if row.get("WeightUomId") and d.get("weightUomId") is None:
		self.view.custom.editDraft.weightUomId = row.get("WeightUomId")

customMethods.name: startup
customMethods.script:
# Operator gate: no logged-in operator -> open the initials popup OVER this screen.
	# Non-blocking: the page still populates behind the modal, and session.custom is
	# reactive, so the operator label/mutations pick up the user with no re-populate.
	if not self.session.custom.appUserId:
		system.perspective.openPopup("mpp-initials", "BlueRidge/Components/Popups/InitialsEntry", params={"popupId": "mpp-initials"}, modal=True, showCloseIcon=False, overlayDismiss=False)

customMethods.name: openCreateConfirm
customMethods.script:
system.perspective.openPopup("mpp-confirm-create-lot",
		"BlueRidge/Components/Popups/ConfirmCreateLot",
		params={"replyMessage": "confirmCreateLotResult", "popupId": "mpp-confirm-create-lot",
			"title": "Create LOT", "message": "Confirm to create this LOT, then choose what to do with the form."},
		modal=True, showCloseIcon=True)

customMethods.name: clearForAnother
customMethods.script:
# Keep everything; clear only the cavity, then focus the LTT field for the next scan.
	self.view.custom.editDraft.toolCavityId = None
	self.view.custom.editDraft.cavityNote = None
	try:
		self.getChild("Body").getChild("NewLotForm").getChild("LttField").getChild("LttInput").focus()
	except:
		pass

messageHandlers.script:
# A reject changes the shift tally (scrap-inclusive) - force a re-read.
	self.view.custom.refreshToken = (self.view.custom.refreshToken or 0) + 1
